= Costume Fragments =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Costume Fragment|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Costume Fragment|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Costume Fragment|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Costume Fragment|orange}}
|}

= Minion Skin Fragments =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Minion Skin Fragment|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Minion Skin Fragment|orange}}
|}

= Random Fragments =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Fragment|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Fragment|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Fragment|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Fragment|orange}}
|}

= [[Relic]] Fragments =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Relic Fragment|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Relic Fragment|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Relic Fragment|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Relic Fragment|orange}}
|}

= [[Relic]] Fragments (Big) =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Relic Fragment Big|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Relic Fragment Big|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Relic Fragment Big|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Relic Fragment Big|orange}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
